meta.title: Black Meridian — Bespoke Tattoo | Shoreditch, London
meta.description: London's most considered custom tattoo studio...

featureBanner: ✦ GDPR-Compliant Booking · Transparent Pricing · Deposit-Secured Sessions

about.heading:
Art earned,
not applied.
paragraphs: Black Meridian opened in Shoreditch in 2014 on a single belief: that every tattoo should be designed from zero. No flash pulled from a binder. No style forced on a body that doesn't suit it.

Our artists draw across neo-traditional, Japanese irezumi, fine line, and deliberate ignorant work. The common thread is intention — every piece is a conversation between the artist and the person wearing it for the rest of their life.
We operate under strict medical-grade hygiene protocols and are fully ICO-registered for GDPR compliance. Your data, like our work, is handled with care.
about.caption: "A great tattoo is a negotiation between permanence and beauty."

process.title: Your Session
process.desc: Arrive, settle in, and let the work happen...

styles.name: Neo-Traditional
styles.desc: Bold outlines, rich palette, narrative subject matter...

styles.name: Japanese Irezumi
styles.desc: Centuries of tradition rendered in bold composition...

services.title: Custom Tattooing
services.desc: Fully bespoke designs drawn from scratch. Nothing off a binder. Every piece conceived for the person wearing it.

services.title: Cover-Up Work
services.desc: Transform existing work into something you're proud of. Intelligent cover-up strategies using shadow and composition.

services.title: Touch-Ups
services.desc: Faded, blown-out, or in need of refresh? We restore existing pieces to full clarity and vibrancy.

services.title: Consultations
services.desc: Free 30-minute consultations. No obligation. We'll tell you exactly what's achievable and quote you honestly.

services.title: Flash Days
services.desc: Monthly flash events — pre-drawn designs at set prices. Walk in, choose, leave with ink the same day.

services.title: Guest Artists
services.desc: We regularly host international guest artists. Check the booking calendar for upcoming dates and unique styles.

artists.name: Ravi Saunders
artists.bio: Specializing in large-scale illustrative work that blends traditional bold lines with modern composition.

artists.name: Cleo Marsh
artists.bio: Known for delicate, single-needle precision and organic botanical flow that complements the body's natural curves.

artists.name: Juno Bell
artists.bio: Minimalist, immediate, and provocative. Juno's work explores the 'ignorant style' through high-contrast blackwork.

testimonials.quote: Ravi's neo-trad sleeve is the most considered work I've ever seen. Three sessions, zero compromise.
testimonials.name: James H.

testimonials.quote: Cleo's fine line botanical is so delicate it looks like someone drew on my skin with a crow feather.
testimonials.name: Priya M.

testimonials.quote: The consultation alone was worth the journey from Manchester. These people take the work seriously.
testimonials.name: Tom F.

testimonials.quote: Juno's ignorant piece is the one that gets the most attention. Paradoxically, that feels right.
testimonials.name: Sara K.

booking.heading: Book Your Session
booking.sub: Every great tattoo begins with a conversation. Fill out the form — we respond within 48 hours.
booking.gdprText: I consent to my data being processed for booking purposes in accordance with UK GDPR.

faq.a: Fill out the form on this page with as much detail as possible...
We offer walk-ins for flash pieces on selected days...
A 20% deposit is required to secure your session...
Yes — we're registered with the ICO...
Sleep well the night before. Eat a proper meal 2 hours prior...

faq.q: Can I see my design before the session?
faq.a: Always. Your artist shares the design before the session begins...

steps: Leave the initial wrap on for 2–4 hours, or as instructed by your artist.
Wash gently with fragrance-free antibacterial soap and lukewarm water. Pat dry — never rub.
Apply a thin layer of unscented moisturiser 2–3 times daily for the first two weeks.
Avoid soaking in baths, pools, or the sea for at least three weeks.
Keep out of direct sunlight during healing. Once healed, always apply SPF 50+ outdoors.
Do not scratch, pick, or peel flaking skin — let it shed naturally.
Wash hands before touching your piercing for any reason.
Clean twice daily with sterile saline wound wash.
Avoid rotating or removing jewellery during healing.
Do not use alcohol, hydrogen peroxide, or antiseptic sprays.
Lobe healing: 6–8 weeks. Cartilage: 6–12 months. Be patient.

footer.copy: Premium custom tattoo art. Est. 2014, London. ICO registered. GDPR compliant.
